CVE-2025-11721.title: Memory safety bug present in Firefox 143 and Thunderbird 143. Thi ...
CVE-2025-11721.description: Memory safety bug present in Firefox 143 and Thunderbird 143. This bug showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort this could have been exploited to run arbitrary code. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 144 and Thunderbird 144.

CVE-2026-16349.title: Same-origin policy bypass in the DOM: Navigation component. This  ...
CVE-2026-16349.description: Same-origin policy bypass in the DOM: Navigation component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 153, Firefox ESR 115.38, and Firefox ESR 140.13.
